page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs with a 1:1 physical-to-virtual core mapping and is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding 2.0 GB of memory per core. The instance operates on a KVM hypervisor, includes a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps, and does not bundle local storage or GPUs.

Benchmark results indicate strong performance characteristics across multiple domains. The instance achieves top 25% results in stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests, as well as in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark CPU evaluations. Memory performance is highly competitive, with the PassMark memory score reaching the top 10% tier, and small-block cached read-only memory bandwidth placing in the top 25%. However, uncached large-block read and write memory bandwidths fall into the average category.

Given its compute-heavy profile and high memory bandwidth efficiency, this instance is well-suited for compute-intensive tasks such as ray tracing, image processing, and Redis caching, where it delivers 61.81 million operations per second. It also supports efficient small-model LLM inference. The dedicated CPU allocation and high resource density provide a cost-effective solution for workloads requiring predictable, sustained CPU performance without the overhead of hyperthreading or local storage maintenance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, 16 Gbps of baseline network bandwidth, and no bundled local storage or GPUs. Performance benchmarks place this server in the top 25% for stress-ng CPU tests, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and PassMark CPU evaluations, while its PassMark memory score reaches the top 10% tier. With strong results in Redis SET operations and image processing, the ecs.c7a.16xlarge is highly efficient for compute-heavy workloads, database operations, and small-scale LLM inference. Its dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable performance, making it a qualitatively cost-effective choice for sustained multi-threaded processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 64 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core performance for compute-intensive workloads.

tagline: A high-density, compute-optimized virtual server featuring sixty-four dedicated AMD EPYC cores and exceptional memory bandwidth for demanding multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 vCPUs with 1.0 thread per core.
Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM and 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
Top-tier memory performance and strong multi-core CPU benchmark results.
Optimized for compute-heavy tasks, Redis caching, and image processing.
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators.
